puzzle.title: The Siege of Conviction
puzzle.intro: A vast coalition, fueled by a common animosity, gathered its strength from all corners. They marched with overwhelming numbers, certain of their victory, to lay siege to a city of faith. They expected a swift end, but found their plans thwarted by an unseen power and a resilience they could not comprehend. Who are we?
clues: We were a mighty gathering, a confederation of different tribes united by a single purpose: to extinguish a light that had begun to shine.
We advanced on a city, confident in our superior numbers and strength, expecting to crush its inhabitants easily.
To our surprise, we were met not by an army in the open field, but by a deep trench that halted our entire force.
Our siege was long and frustrating, and our resolve began to weaken as hypocrisy and doubt spread within our ranks.
We were battered by a freezing, violent wind sent by Allah, which overturned our tents, extinguished our fires, and filled our hearts with terror.

Our formidable alliance, which included the Quraysh and the Ghatafan tribes, was ultimately forced to retreat in disarray without achieving our goal, a testament to a divine protection we could not overcome.

trial.label: Our Defining Event
options: The Siege of Madinah (Battle of the Trench)
The Building of the Dam of Ma'rib
trial.answer: The Siege of Madinah (Battle of the Trench)

location.label: A Key Element
options: A Flock of Birds with Clay Stones

outcome.label: Our Outcome
options: Forced to retreat in failure and disarray
outcome.answer: Forced to retreat in failure and disarray

puzzle.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَةَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ إِذْ جَآءَتْكُمْ جُنُودٌۭ فَأَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا وَجُنُودًۭا لَّمْ تَرَوْهَا ۚ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرًا
puzzle.verse: O you who have believed, remember the favor of Allāh upon you when armies came to [attack] you and We sent upon them a wind and armies [of angels] you did not see. And ever is Allāh, of what you do, Seeing. (33:9)
